title: Pan-Seared Turnip with Crunchy Topping
description: A simple yet flavorful side dish that showcases the sweetness of turnip paired with a crunchy topping.
instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Peel and slice the turnip into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
Season the turnip with salt and pepper.
Add 1 tablespoon of malty to the skillet and swirl to coat.
Add the turnip slices to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender.
While the turnip is cooking, mix the remaining 1 tablespoon of malty with the crunchy in a small bowl.
Once the turnip is done, transfer it to a plate and top with the crunchy mixture.
